title: Add request timing middleware
description: Create middleware in `src/middleware/request-timing.ts` that measures request duration and adds `X-Response-Time` header with integration test. Should follow existing middleware patterns (factory function, NextRequest/NextResponse, excludePaths config).
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts: Factory pattern with config object, middleware function returning NextResponse, excludePaths support, IP extraction from headers
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts: Next.js middleware with header manipulation, createsRateLimiterMiddleware factory
src/middleware/request-logger.test.ts: Test pattern with makeRequest helper, vi.useFakeTimers(), and header verification
